entity: Kevin Garnett BOS stint 2007-12 must be #5 (stable anchor)
notes: Garnett's Celtics stint runs 2007-08 through 2012-13 (he was traded to Brooklyn in July 2013, after playing the full 2012-13 season in Boston), so end_year is 2013 under the start-year+1 convention (matches the convention used elsewhere, e.g. Kobe's LAL #24 stint ending 2016 for a 2015-16 final season).
